title: sphaeralcea subhastata var. thyrsoidea
intro: Sphaeralcea subhastata var. thyrsoidea, also known as the Mexican globe mallow or globe mallow, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant's roots have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea subhastata var. thyrsoidea include its potential to treat wounds, fever, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
